title: Shipping Information
intro: We deliver discreetly across all of Thailand. Fast delivery available in Pattaya and surrounding areas.
policies: All orders are sealed and shipped in discreet packaging
Tracking number provided for every order via WhatsApp
Same-day delivery available in Pattaya area for orders before 2pm
Free shipping on all orders over ฿5,000
Standard shipping fee of ฿500 for orders under ฿5,000
